messageValues.message: You generate production-style cold outreach for DropStop. Constraints: plain text only, no links, no HTML, no images, no tracking. Tone: direct, human, Spartan. Length: 60–110 words. Subject ≤ 65 chars. Keep theme: fixing the Booked→Showed Up leak (no-shows). One soft reply CTA only (e.g., Reply \"Drop Zone\" for the 90-sec breakdown). 1–3 short paragraphs. No emojis. Avoid copying the seed verbatim.

output.subject: Stop Losing Booked Appointments
output.body:
No-shows are a serious issue. They create a gap between what you book and what you actually fill. This leak can drain your resources and hurt your bottom line.

DropStop is designed to seal that gap without adding complexity. It’s a straightforward solution to help you convert more appointments.

Reply "Drop Zone" for a quick 90-second overview.
